title: Bundles Throw Potions
description: Stack and throw your potions with bundles!
body:
![banner2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f39641187d34c81d18992848eee696b29498242.png)

## Description
Bundles Throw Potions is a vanilla-friendly datapack/mod that makes bundles even more useful, allowing you to throw potions directly from it and holding up to 4 potions

## Important notes
- This mod/datapack is intended for survival mode and will work partially in creative
- Made for 1.21.4+ but works on 1.21.3 with a visual glitch that can't be fixed
- Works fine in multiplayer (only the host needs the mod)

## Stacking
All kinds of potions now stack up to 4 inside the bundles

![stacking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7593ab30f3a9078b3726f08d15a4e26a9a0079d2.png)

## Throwing
Splash and lingering potions can now be thrown directly from the bundle. Just right-click the bundle with the potion inside

![splash](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExeDRnaHpienVvdHI0eDAxdGl0eHRmbWphOHNwZmhpbXI1MWlkYmx4aSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/d7uoMu8TwuMZNUN1Gi/giphy.gif)

![lingering](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbGJja3k0NmU2anF5Mjh6OW90YW5jZWx5cmZibDRpcG93bjh0d3E4NyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/gm05m4bmt8BrxkJTbO/giphy.gif)
